top_signals.title: Amazon unveils latest warehouse robot as tech giants continue AI layoffs
top_signals.summary: "Our experience of robots is that it's actually driven up employment rather than the reverse," Amazon executive John Boumphrey told CNBC.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hyperliquid treasuries stand alone in profit as legacy crypto DATs bleed billions
top_signals.summary: Strategy, Bitmine, and other major treasury firms have seen paper gains evaporate as crypto prices continue sliding.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Pugilistic Florida billionaire plots law firm stake sale to private equity
top_signals.summary: Move by largest US personal injury firm could cement buyout groups’ arrival in a sector that has long been off-limits
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump says US may take equity stakes in AI companies
top_signals.summary: President suggests ‘partnership’ will ease voter concerns about the technology ahead of November’s midterm elections
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Mythos rejuvenated the cybersecurity sector. Earnings put the recent rally to the test
top_signals.summary: Mythos gave the cybersecurity sector a boost, but upbeat earnings weren't enough for investors in search of an AI payoff.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
